flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Metropolitan State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Metropolitan State University rose 80% between 2021 and 2024 (15.1% → 27.1%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Metropolitan State University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (38.4% → 43.6%).
